name: tsqlanalyzer
description: Live T-SQL code analysis (design, naming and performance rules) powered by SqlServer.Rules and DacFx.

tsqlAnalyzer.enable.description: Enable live T-SQL analysis of .sql files.

tsqlAnalyzer.serverPath.description: Path to the ErikEJ.TSQLAnalyzerCli executable (or 'tsqlanalyze' dotnet tool). When empty, the analyzer bundled with the extension is used, falling back to 'tsqlanalyze' on the PATH.

tsqlAnalyzer.rules.description: Rules expression controlling which rules are disabled, e.g. '-SqlServer.Rules.SRD0004;-SqlServer.Rules.SRN*'. Note: unlike the CLI, the server-mode rules string is NOT prefixed with 'Rules:'. Each reported problem carries its own warning/error level.

tsqlAnalyzer.sqlVersion.description: Target SQL Server version used for analysis.

tsqlAnalyzer.additionalAnalyzers.description: Additional analyzer .dll paths to load during analysis.

tsqlAnalyzer.debounceMs.description: Delay in milliseconds after the last edit before analysis is triggered.
